data.title: Columbus McKinnon releases Q3 estimated preliminary unaudited financial results: $250-260M net sales, $747-757M for 9 months, $38-40M Adjusted EBITDA, $0.58-$0.63 Adjusted EPS for Q3. Orders received $245-250M, backlog $335-345M as of Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Columbus McKinnon Corporation reported estimated preliminary unaudited financial results for the third quarter ending December 31, 2025. Net sales are expected to be $250-260 million for the quarter and $747-757 million for the nine months. Adjusted EBITDA is projected to be $38-40 million for the quarter and $115-117 million for the nine months. Adjusted EPS is estimated to range between $0.58-0.63 for the quarter and $1.70-1.75 for the nine months. Orders received during the quarter are anticipated to be $245-250 million. Backlog as of December 31, 2025, is expected to be between $335-345 million, down 3% from the previous quarter. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Genuine Foods partners with Culinary Institute of Barcelona to launch first certification for institutional dining.
data.description: A landmark collaboration sets a revolutionary benchmark for institutional food and culinary expertise in Boston and Barcelona. On Jan. 14, 2026, Genuine Foods, a prominent food service provider catering to K12 schools, colleges, and community establishments nationwide, revealed a groundbreaking partnership.

data.title: TON price may hit $2.40 by January 2026, with current support at $1.73 offering entry points for growth.
data.description: Toncoin is experiencing a bullish trend signaling a potential increase to $2.40, as per technical analysis. The current support level is at $1.73, presenting entry points for investors looking to capitalize on the upward movement.

data.title: Globalstar adds 3 new 6m C-3 antennas at Yeo Ju Ground Station in South Korea, expanding infrastructure.
data.description: Globalstar, Inc. disclosed the installation of three new six-meter C-3 tracking antennas at its Yeo Ju, South Korea ground station. This step follows over twenty years of offering mobile satellite services in East Asia from the same location. With this addition, the ground station now features a total of three C-3 tracking antennas. Globalstar is recognized as a leading telecommunications infrastructure and technology provider, operating under the NASDAQ symbol GSAT.

data.title: iHeartMedia reveals host, nominees for 2026 iHeartPodcast Awards at SXSW on March 16, in Austin, Texas.
data.description: iHeartMedia, the leading global podcast publisher as per Podtrac, revealed the host and contenders for The 2026 iHeartPodcast Awards presented in collaboration with South by Southwest® (SXSW®). The ceremony will take place at ACL Live at the Moody Theater in Austin, Texas for the second year in a row to honor outstanding podcasts and influential creators in the field. The event will occur on Monday, March 16, 2026, at 7 p.m. This major event will bring together the best talents in podcasting to celebrate their achievements.

data.title: Insight Enterprises partners with Stripe to revamp enterprise commerce, leveraging AI-driven solutions.(_: 120)
data.description: In Chandler, Arizona, Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ: NSIT) revealed a new global partnership with Stripe aimed at assisting enterprises in updating outdated financial systems, enhancing checkout conversion rates, and leveraging AI-driven commerce advancements. This collaboration merges Stripe's customizable financial services platform with Insight's Solutions Integrator expertise to speed up the process by which large companies introduce new digital revenue models and expand on a global scale.

data.title: Clutch launches B2B Expert Picks program to assist buyers in making confident decisions.
data.description: In Washington today, Clutch, a prominent global B2B service provider marketplace, unveiled B2B Expert Picks, a fresh initiative aimed at simplifying the process for business executives to locate and engage suitable service collaborators through specially curated lists. With the evolving complexity of B2B procurement, buyers are increasingly seeking a balance between trustworthy data of exceptional quality and personalized recommendations when selecting a partner to facilitate business expansion. Tim Condon, Chief Revenue Officer, emphasized this need for a comprehensive approach to decision-making.

data.title: Tuwaiq Sculpture 2026 returns to Riyadh for its 7th edition with the theme "Traces of What Will Be," from Jan 12-22.
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, on January 14, 2026, the Royal Commission for Riyadh City launched the seventh edition of the annual international sculpture symposium, Tuwaiq Sculpture 2026, through Riyadh Art. The event will run from January 12 to 22.

data.title: AppYea, Inc. transitions to revenue focus, sets commercial framework in The Gambia, reports Jan 14 milestone. OTCPQ: APYP.
data.description: AppYea, Inc. (OTCQB: APYP) revealed a substantial operational milestone on Jan. 14, 2026 in JERUSALEM. This marked engagement highlights a burgeoning commercial interest, indicating early demand in regulated digital gaming markets. The Company's success in establishing a scalable licensing model is pivotal for future growth.

data.title: Ingenico partners with WalletConnect Pay to enable stablecoin payments at physical checkouts, expanding merchant options.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, the renowned payment acceptance and services company Ingenico revealed a groundbreaking collaboration with WalletConnect Pay. This partnership facilitates stablecoin payments at checkout for merchants. By integrating WalletConnect Pay, merchants can now accept various stablecoins directly, enhancing payment options for consumers. This move is set to revolutionize the way transactions are conducted, offering greater flexibility and efficiency in the payment process.

data.title: Branded Legacy, Inc. undergoes management overhaul with new leadership after acquisition by Dr. Jamie Forrest.       (Characters: 107)
data.description: Today in Vancouver, British Columbia on December 10, 2025, Branded Legacy, Inc. (OTC: BLEG) revealed a significant restructuring and change of control after shareholder Dr. Jamie Forrest, PhD, MPH acquired the controlling interest in the company.

data.title: Dow sinks as year-end rally falters; Nvidia slides and Rocket Lab falls after surprise jobless claims. Warren Buffett steps down.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following unexpected weekly jobless claims. Both Nvidia and Rocket Lab also faced drops in their stock prices. The stock market today witnessed a downturn as the year-end rally faltered. Nvidia's value plummeted as Warren Buffett announced his resignation. Live coverage of this market turmoil can be found on Investor's Business Daily. This news reflects a trend of economic uncertainty as investors react to the latest figures.

data.title: Salarius Pharmaceuticals becomes Decoy Therapeutics with Nasdaq ticker DCOY, emphasizing peptide conjugate therapeutics.
data.description: In the latest update, it has been reported that the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has reached over 10 million worldwide, with the death toll surpassing 500,000. Despite efforts to control the spread through lockdowns and social distancing measures, some countries are experiencing a resurgence in cases, leading to concerns about a second wave of infections. Health officials are urging the public to continue following safety guidelines to prevent further outbreaks. In the meantime, researchers are working tirelessly to develop a vaccine, with several promising candidates currently in clinical trials. As the situation continues to evolve, governments and communities are adapting their strategies to mitigate the impact of the pandemic.

data.title: Dow Jones futures fall as 2025 nears end. Shopify, Eli Lilly establish new buy points, market at highs and key support.
data.description: As 2025 comes to a close, the stock market is reaching record highs with significant support levels. Companies like Shopify and Eli Lilly have established new buy points. Dow Jones Futures are showing a slight decline as we approach the final trading day of the year. This promising economic trend showcases the potential for increased investment opportunities in the coming year.

data.title: Northrim BanCorp completes $60.0 million Subordinated Notes offering to investors, due 2035.
data.description: Today, Northrim BanCorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: NRIM) based in Anchorage, Alaska, disclosed the successful conclusion of a private offering. The company has raised $60.0 million through the issuance of 6.875% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Subordinated Notes due 2035. These notes were purchased by select qualified institutional buyers and institutional accredited investors.

data.title: OTC Markets Group adds Bora Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. (TWSE: 6472; OTCQX: BORAY) to OTCQX. (Characters: 91)
data.description: On January 7, 2026, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Bora Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. (TWSE: 6472; OTCQX: BORAY) has been approved to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc., the operator of regulated markets trading 12,000 U.S. and international securities, made this announcement. Bora Pharmaceuticals is a renowned international contract development and manufacturing organization and specialty pharmaceutical company. This move allows Bora Pharmaceuticals to access the OTCQX Best Market platform for trading its shares.

data.title: Magnum Ice Cream Co. (TMICC) completes €3B debut bond issuance, world's largest ice cream company.
data.description: Today, the Magnum Ice Cream Company (TMICC) has successfully completed its debut bond issuance, raising a total of €3 billion. TMICC stands as the global leading ice cream company.

data.title: Betcha found in a study of 42 US-accessible crypto casinos, only 18% had withdrawals under an hour. Jackbit stood out with 8-minute withdrawals.
data.description: In Glendale, California on November 21, 2025, Betcha, a casino review platform, shared results from its thorough analysis of fast payout casinos, investigating 42 platforms accessible in the US. The research, carried out from September to October 2025 involving $50,000 in real money deposits, uncovered that just 18% of casinos claiming "instant" or "fast" payouts truly deliver withdrawals in under one hour. Jackbit, managed by Ryker B.V, stood out as the top performer, with an average processing time of 8 minutes during various withdrawal tests supported by blockchain-verified timestamps.
